_comment: Mutation testing for the engine + store contract surface. Coverage % proves lines executed; this proves tests detect mutations. Initial baseline (2026-05-06): 72.77% global — engine 87.10 (rules 95, actions 86, ai 84, color 83), store 40.58 (useCombatStore 27, useGameStore 60). The store gap is the headline finding: line coverage was ~100% but tests assert outcomes loosely and miss literal/boolean/array mutations. Ratchet target: tighten store assertions, then lift break threshold. Not wired into npm run ci — full run is multi-minute; treat as on-demand or scheduled CI.
